name: Beef Steak Tomatoes with Garden Herbs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh herbs (parsley, chives, basil, marjoram, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped green onions, minced garlic, minced hot chili pepper, and fresh lemon juice in a bowl.
2. Gradually beat in the olive oil and plain low-fat yogurt until smooth.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. Finely chop the herbs (parsley, chives, basil, marjoram, etc.) and add them to the mixture.
5. Mix well. The sauce can be prepared in a food processor or blender for easier blending.
6. Refrigerate the dressing until ready to serve.
7. Serve over sliced beefsteak tomatoes and sliced onions.
